parameters.name: StartDate
parameters.description:
Start date for the report (date included)\
String formatted:
- absolute date: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss" *(ex: `"1984-12-28T10:10:00"`)*
- relative date: CURRENT-[HOUR | DAY | WEEK | MONTH | YEAR]-[Number] or NOW *(ex: `"CURRENT-DAY-1"`)*

parameters.name: EndDate
parameters.description:
Start date for the report (date excluded).\
String formatted :
- absolute date: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss" *(ex: `"1984-12-28T10:10:00"`)*
- relative date: CURRENT-[HOUR | DAY | WEEK | MONTH | YEAR]-[Number] or NOW *(ex: `"CURRENT-DAY-1"`)*

parameters.name: SortBy
parameters.description:
Sort report elements on given `Metric` or `Dimension`\
*Ex: `"impressions"`, `"DealName"`*

parameters.name: SortByType
parameters.description:
Sort report elements on given `Type` in compare mode\
*Ex: `"CHANGE"`, `"RELATIVE_CHANGE"`*

parameters.name: SortAsc
parameters.description:
Direction for report elements sort\
Accepted values: `"ASC"`, `"DESC"`

parameters.name: Simulate
parameters.description: Simulate if report can be generate

parameters.name: IsSamplingAccepted
parameters.description:
If true, indicates that sampled statistics can be used for this query.
Sampling will provide higher performance and greater dimension choice.

parameters.name: Metrics
parameters.description:
List of metrics to include in the report\
List of all metrics on **/metrics** endpoint\
*Ex: `"publisherGrossRevenuePublisherCurrency"`, `"impressions"`*

parameters.name: Dimensions
parameters.description:
List of dimensions to include in the report\
List of all dimensions on **/dimensions** endpoint\
*Ex: `"DealId"`, `"DealName"`, `"SeatId"`*

parameters.name: Periodicity
parameters.description:
Periodicity for metrics on the selected period (`StartDate`, `EndDate`)\
Output in the report in `Days` or `Hours`) as a timestamp\
If not provided, the report outputs the total for each metrics on the period\
Accepted values: `"HOUR"`, `"DAY"`

parameters.name: Filters
parameters.description:
List of filters to apply on dimensions\
Report data must fulfill all filters in the list (AND condition)\
*Ex: Report on deal with id 1 and seat with id 2: `[DealId = 1, SeatId = 2]`*

parameters.name: Timezone
parameters.description:
Timezone using IANA format for `StartDate` and `EndDate` (default: user network timezone)\
Output timestamp for "days" and "hours" when periodicity is specified respects this timezone\
> *Ex: `"Europe/Paris"`, `"America/New_York"`*

parameters.name: DateFormat
parameters.description:
Format date field to match the given format\
*Ex: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss will ouput 2019-05-20T12:08:56

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
The filtering strategy. The value is an expression composed using the available functions
(see below).

<details>
  <summary>Available functions</summary>
  
  The value is an expression composed using the following functions:
  | Operation                     | Function         | Example                                               |
  | ---                           | ---              | ---                                                   |
  | Equality                      | `equals`         | `?filter=equals(lastName,'Smith')`                    |
  | Less than                     | `lessThan`       | `?filter=lessThan(age,'25')`                          |
  | Less than or equal to         | `lessOrEqual`    | `?filter=lessOrEqual(lastModified,'2001-01-01')`      |
  | Greater than                  | `greaterThan`    | `?filter=greaterThan(duration,'6:12:14')`             |
  | Greater than or equal to      | `greaterOrEqual` | `?filter=greaterOrEqual(percentage,'33.33')`          |
  | Contains text                 | `contains`       | `?filter=contains(description,'cooking')`             |
  | Starts with text              | `startsWith`     | `?filter=startsWith(description,'The')`               |
  | Ends with text                | `endsWith`       | `?filter=endsWith(description,'End')`                 |
  | Equals one value from set     | `any`            | `?filter=any(chapter,'Intro','Summary','Conclusion')` |
  | Collection contains items     | `has`            | `?filter=has(articles)`                               |
  | Type-check derived type       | `isType`         | `?filter=isType(,men)`                                |
  | Negation                      | `not`            | `?filter=not(equals(lastName,null))`                  |
  | Conditional logical OR        | `or`             | `?filter=or(has(orders),has(invoices))`               |
  | Conditional logical AND       | `and`            | `?filter=and(has(orders),has(invoices))`              |
<details>

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:
Allows sorting by one or more attributes in ascending or descending order. The default is ascending by ID.
<details>
  <summary>Examples</summary>
  * Ascending: `?sort=author`
  * Descending: `?sort=-author`
  * Multiple: `?sort=author,-title`
  * Count: `?sort=count(articles)`
</details>

parameters.name: page[size]
parameters.description: The number of items to return per page

parameters.name: page[number]
parameters.description: The page number to return

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
The related resources to include in the response. The value is a comma-separated list of relationship paths.
<details>
  <summary>Examples</summary>
  * Single: `?include=author`
  * Multiple: `?include=author,comments`
  * Nested: `?include=author,comments.author`
</details>

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
The filtering strategy. The value is an expression composed using the available functions
(see below).

<details>
  <summary>Available functions</summary>
  
  The value is an expression composed using the following functions:
  | Operation                     | Function         | Example                                               |
  | ---                           | ---              | ---                                                   |
  | Equality                      | `equals`         | `?filter=equals(lastName,'Smith')`                    |
  | Less than                     | `lessThan`       | `?filter=lessThan(age,'25')`                          |
  | Less than or equal to         | `lessOrEqual`    | `?filter=lessOrEqual(lastModified,'2001-01-01')`      |
  | Greater than                  | `greaterThan`    | `?filter=greaterThan(duration,'6:12:14')`             |
  | Greater than or equal to      | `greaterOrEqual` | `?filter=greaterOrEqual(percentage,'33.33')`          |
  | Contains text                 | `contains`       | `?filter=contains(description,'cooking')`             |
  | Starts with text              | `startsWith`     | `?filter=startsWith(description,'The')`               |
  | Ends with text                | `endsWith`       | `?filter=endsWith(description,'End')`                 |
  | Equals one value from set     | `any`            | `?filter=any(chapter,'Intro','Summary','Conclusion')` |
  | Collection contains items     | `has`            | `?filter=has(articles)`                               |
  | Type-check derived type       | `isType`         | `?filter=isType(,men)`                                |
  | Negation                      | `not`            | `?filter=not(equals(lastName,null))`                  |
  | Conditional logical OR        | `or`             | `?filter=or(has(orders),has(invoices))`               |
  | Conditional logical AND       | `and`            | `?filter=and(has(orders),has(invoices))`              |
<details>

parameters.name: sort

  * Ascending: `?sort=author`
  * Descending: `?sort=-author`
  * Multiple: `?sort=author,-title`
  * Count: `?sort=count(articles)`
</details>

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
The filtering strategy. The value is an expression composed using the available functions
(see below).

<details>
  <summary>Available functions</summary>
  
  The value is an expression composed using the following functions:
  | Operation                     | Function         | Example                                               |
  | ---                           | ---              | ---                                                   |
  | Equality                      | `equals`         | `?filter=equals(lastName,'Smith')`                    |
  | Less than                     | `lessThan`       | `?filter=lessThan(age,'25')`                          |
  | Less than or equal to         | `lessOrEqual`    | `?filter=lessOrEqual(lastModified,'2001-01-01')`      |
  | Greater than                  | `greaterThan`    | `?filter=greaterThan(duration,'6:12:14')`             |
  | Greater than or equal to      | `greaterOrEqual` | `?filter=greaterOrEqual(percentage,'33.33')`          |
  | Contains text                 | `contains`       | `?filter=contains(description,'cooking')`             |
  | Starts with text              | `startsWith`     | `?filter=startsWith(description,'The')`               |
  | Ends with text                | `endsWith`       | `?filter=endsWith(description,'End')`                 |
  | Equals one value from set     | `any`            | `?filter=any(chapter,'Intro','Summary','Conclusion')` |
  | Collection contains items     | `has`            | `?filter=has(articles)`                               |
  | Type-check derived type       | `isType`         | `?filter=isType(,men)`                                |
  | Negation                      | `not`            | `?filter=not(equals(lastName,null))`                  |
  | Conditional logical OR        | `or`             | `?filter=or(has(orders),has(invoices))`               |
  | Conditional logical AND       | `and`            | `?filter=and(has(orders),has(invoices))`              |
<details>

  * Multiple: `?sort=author,-title`
  * Count: `?sort=count(articles)`
</details>

parameters.description:
The filtering strategy. The value is an expression composed using the available functions
(see below).

<details>
  <summary>Available functions</summary>
  
  The value is an expression composed using the following functions:
  | Operation                     | Function         | Example                                               |
  | ---                           | ---              | ---                                                   |
  | Equality                      | `equals`         | `?filter=equals(lastName,'Smith')`                    |
  | Less than                     | `lessThan`       | `?filter=lessThan(age,'25')`                          |
  | Less than or equal to         | `lessOrEqual`    | `?filter=lessOrEqual(lastModified,'2001-01-01')`      |
  | Greater than                  | `greaterThan`    | `?filter=greaterThan(duration,'6:12:14')`             |
  | Greater than or equal to      | `greaterOrEqual` | `?filter=greaterOrEqual(percentage,'33.33')`          |
  | Contains text                 | `contains`       | `?filter=contains(description,'cooking')`             |
  | Starts with text              | `startsWith`     | `?filter=startsWith(description,'The')`               |
  | Ends with text                | `endsWith`       | `?filter=endsWith(description,'End')`                 |
  | Equals one value from set     | `any`            | `?filter=any(chapter,'Intro','Summary','Conclusion')` |
  | Collection contains items     | `has`            | `?filter=has(articles)`                               |
  | Type-check derived type       | `isType`         | `?filter=isType(,men)`                                |
  | Negation                      | `not`            | `?filter=not(equals(lastName,null))`                  |
  | Conditional logical OR        | `or`             | `?filter=or(has(orders),has(invoices))`               |
  | Conditional logical AND       | `and`            | `?filter=and(has(orders),has(invoices))`              |
<details>

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
The filtering strategy. The value is an expression composed using the available functions
(see below).

<details>
  <summary>Available functions</summary>
  
  The value is an expression composed using the following functions:
  | Operation                     | Function         | Example                                               |
  | ---                           | ---              | ---                                                   |
  | Equality                      | `equals`         | `?filter=equals(lastName,'Smith')`                    |
  | Less than                     | `lessThan`       | `?filter=lessThan(age,'25')`                          |
  | Less than or equal to         | `lessOrEqual`    | `?filter=lessOrEqual(lastModified,'2001-01-01')`      |
  | Greater than                  | `greaterThan`    | `?filter=greaterThan(duration,'6:12:14')`             |
  | Greater than or equal to      | `greaterOrEqual` | `?filter=greaterOrEqual(percentage,'33.33')`          |
  | Contains text                 | `contains`       | `?filter=contains(description,'cooking')`             |
  | Starts with text              | `startsWith`     | `?filter=startsWith(description,'The')`               |
  | Ends with text                | `endsWith`       | `?filter=endsWith(description,'End')`                 |
  | Equals one value from set     | `any`            | `?filter=any(chapter,'Intro','Summary','Conclusion')` |
  | Collection contains items     | `has`            | `?filter=has(articles)`                               |
  | Type-check derived type       | `isType`         | `?filter=isType(,men)`                                |
  | Negation                      | `not`            | `?filter=not(equals(lastName,null))`                  |
  | Conditional logical OR        | `or`             | `?filter=or(has(orders),has(invoices))`               |
  | Conditional logical AND       | `and`            | `?filter=and(has(orders),has(invoices))`              |
<details>
